content.text:
{
  "output_type": "refusal",
  "refusal_trigger": "missing_submission_metadata_and_practitioner_scope",
  "refusal_explanation": "The request did not include the required structured submission block containing verified practitioner metadata, practitioner scope flags, patient pseudonymous ID, and clinical notes. As specified in the operating instructions, when practitioner.scope is not populated the request must be refused because ingredient eligibility filtering and contraindication context cannot be determined. Additionally, the supplied test report contains the patient's full name rather than a pseudonymous identifier, which is inconsistent with the expected de-identified submission pathway. The practitioner should resubmit via the standard intake workflow so that scope, clinical notes, current medications, and a pseudonymous patient ID are provided before a draft Health Analysis and Recommended Formulation Schedule can be produced.",
  "escalation_recommended": true,
  "compliance_self_check": {
    "practitioner_scope_filter_applied": false,
    "no_commercial_framing": true,
    "no_banned_terms": true,
    "no_banned_diagnostic_language": true,
    "no_banned_causal_language": true,
    "no_banned_recommendation_language": true,
    "no_banned_therapeutic_claims": true,
    "no_restricted_representations": true,
    "notes": "Refusal output. Practitioner scope filter could not be applied because the submission block (including practitioner.scope flags) was not provided. Standard contraindication checks and biomarker analysis were not performed because no formulation was generated. Clinical content of the test report was not interpreted in the refusal text."
  },
  "audit_metadata": {
    "prompt_version": "0.1.0",
    "library_revision": "not_referenced_due_to_refusal",
    "submission_id": "not_provided",
    "test_type": "NutriSTAT",
    "practitioner_id_hash": "not_provided",
    "escalation_flags_raised": [
      "missing_submission_block",
      "missing_practitioner_scope",
      "missing_clinical_notes",
      "patient_identifier_not_pseudonymous"
    ],
    "contraindications_flagged": 0,
    "practitioner_scope_filter_applied": false,
    "s4_ingredients_excluded_count": 0
  }
}
